sentences.target: Ton pull vert te va super bien.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ pyl vɛʁ tə va sypɛʁ bjɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ton pull vert te va super bien.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ pyl vɛʁ tə va sypɛʁ bjɛ̃/
translations.en: Your green sweater suits you really well.
translations.es: Tu suéter verde te queda muy bien.
translations.de: Dein grüner Pullover steht dir richtig gut.
translations.it: Il tuo maglione verde ti sta benissimo.
translations.ko: 초록색 스웨터가 너한테 정말 잘 어울려.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的绿色毛衣真的很适合你。
translations.ru: Твой зелёный свитер тебе очень идёт.
translations.pt: Seu suéter verde fica muito bem em você.
translations.vi: Chiếc áo len xanh lá rất hợp với bạn.
translations.ar: السترة الصوفية الخضراء تليق بك جدًا.
translations.nl: Je groene trui staat je heel goed.
translations.uk: Твій зелений светр тобі дуже пасує.
translations.hu: A zöld pulóvered nagyon jól áll neked.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा हरा स्वेटर तुम पर बहुत फबता है.
translations.pl: Twój zielony sweter bardzo ci pasuje.
translations.el: Το πράσινο πουλόβερ σου σου πάει πολύ.
translations.nb: Den grønne genseren kler deg veldig godt.
translations.id: Sweter hijau kamu sangat cocok untukmu.
translations.sv: Din gröna tröja passar dig riktigt bra.
translations.ro: Puloverul tău verde îți vine foarte bine.
translations.cs: Tvůj zelený svetr ti moc sluší.
translations.da: Din grønne trøje klæder dig virkelig godt.
translations.fi: Vihreä neuleesi sopii sinulle todella hyvin.
translations.ja: その緑のセーターはあなたにとてもよく似合っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2SG), agrees with 'pull' (masculine singular) and marks the possessor.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the subject NP of 'va'.
Adjective (masculine singular), post-nominal modifier agreeing with 'pull'.
Clitic pronoun (2SG, dative); indirect object of 'va' in the construction 'aller bien à quelqu'un'.
Main verb, present indicative 3SG; takes 'Ton pull vert' as subject and 'te' as COI.
Adverbial intensifier modifying 'bien'.
Adverb; predicative complement to 'va' indicating manner/degree.

sentences.target: La porte verte ne ferme plus.

translations.fr: La porte verte ne ferme plus.
translations.en: The green door doesn't close anymore.
translations.es: La puerta verde ya no cierra.
translations.de: Die grüne Tür schließt nicht mehr.
translations.it: La porta verde non si chiude più.
translations.ko: 초록색 문이 더 이상 닫히지 않아.
translations.zh-Hans: 那扇绿色的门关不上了。
translations.yue: 嗰扇綠色門而家關唔埋。
translations.pt: A porta verde não fecha mais.
translations.vi: Cánh cửa màu xanh lá không còn đóng được nữa.
translations.nl: De groene deur gaat niet meer dicht.
translations.hu: A zöld ajtó már nem csukódik be.
translations.hi: वह हरा दरवाज़ा अब बंद नहीं होता.
translations.pl: Zielone drzwi już się nie zamykają.
translations.el: Η πράσινη πόρτα δεν κλείνει πια.
translations.nb: Den grønne døren lukker ikke lenger.
translations.id: Pintu hijau itu sudah tidak menutup lagi.
translations.sv: Den gröna dörren stänger inte längre.
translations.ro: Ușa verde nu se mai închide.
translations.da: Den grønne dør lukker ikke længere.
translations.ja: その緑のドアはもう閉まりません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (feminine singular) determining 'porte'.
Common noun (feminine singular); subject of 'ferme'.
Adjective (feminine singular) agreeing with 'porte'.
Negation particle; first part of discontinuous negation with 'plus'.
Main verb, present indicative 3SG; predicate negated by 'ne ... plus'.
Negative adverb meaning 'no longer/anymore', completing 'ne' and scoping over 'ferme'.

sentences.target: J'aime le vert dans cette chambre.

translations.fr: J'aime le vert dans cette chambre.
translations.en: I like the green color in this room.
translations.es: Me gusta el verde de esta habitación.
translations.de: Mir gefällt das Grün in diesem Zimmer.
translations.it: Mi piace il verde in questa stanza.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢这个房间的绿色。
translations.ru: Мне нравится зелёный цвет в этой комнате.
translations.pt: Eu gosto do verde deste quarto.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הירוק בחדר הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi thích màu xanh lá trong căn phòng này.
translations.ar: أحب اللون الأخضر في هذه الغرفة.
translations.nl: Ik hou van het groen in deze kamer.
translations.uk: Мені подобається зелений колір у цій кімнаті.
translations.hu: Tetszik a zöld ebben a szobában.
translations.hi: मुझे इस कमरे का हरा रंग पसंद है.
translations.pl: Podoba mi się zieleń w tym pokoju.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει το πράσινο σε αυτό το δωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Jeg liker det grønne i dette rommet.
translations.id: Saya suka warna hijau di ruangan ini.
translations.sv: Jag gillar det gröna i det här rummet.
translations.ro: Îmi place verdele din această cameră.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi zelená v tomto pokoji.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide det grønne i dette værelse.
translations.ja: この部屋の緑色が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1SG), elided before vowel-initial verb; subject of 'aime'.
Main verb, present indicative 1SG; takes 'le vert' as direct object.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'vert'.
Color noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'aime'.
Preposition introducing the locative PP 'dans cette chambre'.
Demonstrative determiner (feminine singular) agreeing with 'chambre'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Nos plantes vertes ont besoin d'eau.

translations.fr: Nos plantes vertes ont besoin d'eau.
translations.it: Le nostre piante verdi hanno bisogno d'acqua.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的绿色植物需要水。
translations.yue: 我哋啲綠色植物需要水。
translations.pt: Nossas plantas verdes precisam de água.
translations.vi: Những cây xanh của chúng tôi cần nước.
translations.nl: Onze groene planten hebben water nodig.
translations.hu: A zöld növényeinknek vízre van szükségük.
translations.hi: हमारे हरे पौधों को पानी चाहिए.
translations.el: Τα πράσινα φυτά μας χρειάζονται νερό.
translations.ro: Plantele noastre verzi au nevoie de apă.
translations.da: Vores grønne planter har brug for vand.
translations.ja: 私たちの緑の植物には水が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1PL), plural form agreeing with 'plantes'.
Common noun (feminine plural); subject of 'ont'.
Adjective (feminine plural) agreeing with 'plantes'.
Main verb, present indicative 3PL; part of the light-verb construction 'avoir besoin de'.
Noun complement of 'avoir' in 'avoir besoin de'; takes a 'de'-PP specifying what is needed.
Preposition 'de' elided before vowel; introduces the complement of 'besoin'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'd''.
